title: ActionTable
description: The canonical structured interpretation of user intent after completion of the Intent Action Extraction and Clarification Loop. Bridges intent capture and behavior sequence compilation.

intent_ref.description: Reference to the accepted intent artifact (UUID).

actions.description: Ordered list of operational actions extracted from the accepted intent.

lifecycle_state.description: Current lifecycle state of the action table.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this action table was created.

validated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this action table passed validation.

accepted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the user accepted this action table.

compiled_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this action table was compiled into a behavior sequence.

algorithm.description: The cryptographic algorithm used for signing.

signer_role.description: The role of the entity that produced this signature.

signature.description: Optional cryptographic signature over this artifact.

verb.description: Operational action verb (e.g., run, generate, send, collect).

object.description: Entity acted upon (e.g., query, report, notification).

destination.description: Target location for the action result (e.g., database.monthly_quota, email).

qualifiers.description: Format, parameters, or other action modifiers.

dependencies.description: Step numbers of prior actions this action depends on.

source_text.description: Trace back to the original natural language input fragment.
